NAVAREA XIX 120/13
1.RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 230630UTC DEC 13.
   NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.
    72-26.90N 020-18.40E WEST HERCULES  
    66-14,47N 008-19,58E TRANSOCEAN SPITSBERGEN (NEW)              
    65-07.00N 006-40.30E DEEPSEA BERGEN
NOTES:
    A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
    B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I
       WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 118/13
